name: PATENT_YEARS_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Patent years by targetpair. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name: $tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN y.year AS year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY year ASC

examples: In which years were patents related to B7H4/CDH3 published?
In which years were patents related to DAG1/LAMA2 published?
In which years were patents related to CD20/IL12A published?
